raw_consumer_statement: Upon reviewing my XXXX credit card statements in late XXXX, I noticed 10 transactions all between XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX, XXXX, some just a few dollars and one was over {$1200.00}. They all said MERCHANT SALE/PURCHASE with no additional information. I submitted a fraud claim in XX/XX/XXXX. I received a letter from Barclay 's that the denied the claim. When I called the Fraud Dept today ( XX/XX/XXXX ) to ask why it was denied, the person I spoke to said it was because the charges occurred before the accounts were bought from XXXX XXXX  by Barclay 's so they didn't have any information. I find it hard to believe there is no way for them to get information from XXXX to investigate fraud claims but it seems they made no effort to do so. I would like a true fraud investigation as I don't believe I made those purchases.
